title: Mexican Smoked Natto Skewers
description: A unique fusion of Mexican flavors with the traditional Japanese fermented soybean dish, natto. Marinated in a mixture of smoky spices and grilled to perfection on skewers.

ingredients.name: natto
ingredients.notes: look for fermented soybeans in an Asian grocery store

ingredients.name: intricately seasoned chili powder
ingredients.notes: mix of chili powder, cumin, smoked paprika, and lime juice

instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, whisk together intricately seasoned chili powder, olive oil, lime juice, garlic, and cumin.
2. Add the natto to the marinade and mix until well coated.
3. Cover the dish with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
4. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
5. Thread the marinated natto, dates, and lime wedges onto the skewers.
6. Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
7. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes or until the natto is slightly charred.
8. Serve immediately, garnished with chopped cilantro or scallions if desired.
9. Optional: serve with warm flour or corn tortillas for wrapping.
